summary: Outstanding second‑set Morning Dew jam that gave the reviewer goose bumps; recording quality not described.
review: The attendee raves about a superb performance, especially Jerry Garcia’s “Morning Dew” jam toward the end of a tighter‑than‑usual second set. No details are given about the audio source or fidelity, so the recording is assumed to be listenable but uncharacterized.

ai_rating.rationale: The single review rates the show 5 stars and highlights a standout jam, indicating an excellent musical performance. Lack of any recording‑quality commentary forces a conservative rating for the audio side.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound quality, clarity, or mix; no assessment possible beyond it being presumably listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set builds toward a powerful, intimate jam of Morning Dew with a smaller audience adding to the vibe.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as delivering an unbelievable jam on Morning Dew that gave goose bumps.
